legacy_dependency: Primary box-learning mulligan path already consumes memory first. UniversalMulligan can now read PublishedLearning first when pure_learning_mode is enabled, but will still fall back to mulligan.json/MulliganDecks.json when legacy mulligan fallback stays enabled. Keep source files until live logs confirm the old JSON path is no longer used.
retirement_gate: Delete legacy strategy files only after live logs confirm memory decisions are stable and no runtime path still depends on the original JSON assets.
